---
title: "gtscales RTF Example"
format:
  rtf: default
---

```{r}
devtools::load_all(".")
library(gt)
library(scales)
```

This example shows the RTF workflow for `gtscales`.

```{r}
gt::exibble |>
  gt() |>
  gtscale_data_color_continuous(
    column = num,
    palette = c("#A0442C", "white", "#0063B1"),
    labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()),
    width = "220px",
    title = "Numeric scale"
  )
```

```{r}
gt::exibble |>
  gt() |>
  gtscale_data_color_quantiles(
    column = num,
    palette = c("#fdd49e", "#fdbb84", "#ef6548", "#990000"),
    quantiles = 4,
    labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()),
    width = "220px",
    title = "Quartiles"
  )
```
